name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS 247 is a 24/7 check cashing and financial services chain operating across 12 states, offering money services, DMV transactions, and prepaid debit cards.
description_long:
PLS Financial Services, Inc. operates a nationwide network of financial service centers under the PLS 247 brand, with locations across Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin. The profiled location at 4400 W. Armitage Ave. in Chicago is designated a Community Currency Exchange, a licensed category in Illinois that authorizes currency-related transactions beyond standard check cashing. The company has established itself as a multi-service financial hub targeting consumers who operate primarily outside the traditional banking system.

PLS 247 offers an unusually broad range of services under one roof. Core money services include check cashing, money orders, bill payment, Ria Money Transfer for domestic and international remittances, government benefits disbursement, and foreign currency exchange. Illinois locations also function as quasi-DMV service points, handling vehicle registration renewals, title transfers, license plate issuance, and city stickers and transit cards—services that would otherwise require a separate trip to a government office. For consumers seeking a banking alternative, the company issues the Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard, a prepaid Mastercard paired with a mobile app. Business customers can access PLS For Business services, and ancillary offerings include notarization of legal documents, fax and copy services, ATMs, phone top-ups, and cash and coin exchange.

The defining operational feature of PLS 247 is round-the-clock availability. All service categories—including staffed services like check cashing, notary, and transportation transactions—are listed as open 24/7. This sets PLS apart from most competitors in the check cashing space, which typically maintain daytime-only hours. The Xpectations! PLUS mobile app extends some services to digital access. The bundling of financial and transportation services in a single location is particularly practical in urban markets where government offices maintain limited hours and require separate visits.

For consumers who need it, PLS 247 delivers genuine utility: 24-hour access to check cashing and essential financial transactions in underserved neighborhoods. However, check cashing services as a category carry fees that are substantially higher than using a bank account or credit union, and PLS 247 does not disclose its fee schedule on the website—consumers must visit a branch or call to compare costs. The breadth of services is a real advantage for the unbanked, but anyone with access to a traditional financial institution will almost always find cheaper alternatives for converting checks to cash. PLS 247 is best understood as a convenience infrastructure company, not a low-cost financial provider.
pros: Open 24/7 across all service categories, including staffed check cashing and notary services
Offers vehicle registration, title transfers, and license plate services in Illinois locations—eliminating a separate DMV trip
International money transfers available via Ria Money Transfer
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard provides a prepaid banking alternative with a mobile app
Government benefits disbursement available, useful for recipients without bank accounts
Notary services for legal documents including wills, deeds, trusts, and power of attorney
cons: No fee disclosures on the website—check cashing costs require a branch visit or phone call to determine
Check cashing fees industry-wide are significantly higher than using a bank or credit union account
Services are in-person only; no online or mobile check cashing option is offered
Geographic availability limited to 12 states; not accessible to most of the US
Not all services listed may be available at every location—website is structured per-state
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash from a check outside bank hours
Illinois residents who want to combine financial transactions with vehicle registration or title work in one trip
People needing international remittances via Ria Money Transfer without a bank account
Workers paid by paper check who need same-day or late-night cash access
diagnosis: PLS 247 is best for unbanked consumers who need 24/7 access to check cashing, bill payment, or money transfers and can't use a traditional bank. The main caveat is cost: check cashing fees are not disclosed online and are typically far higher than bank alternatives, making this a convenience service rather than a financially efficient one.
services: Notary Services (wills, deeds, trusts, power of attorney)
Fax, Copy, ATM, Phone Top-Ups, Cash & Coins
